tool_args.label: Paratransit service is federally mandated under ADA
tool_args.raw_text: paratransit service is federally mandated in accordance with the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990 ("ADA"), providing origin-to-destination, demand-response, shared ride transportation for individuals with disabilities that cannot use fixed-route public buses and subways

payload.claim_text: Paratransit service is federally mandated in accordance with the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990, providing origin-to-destination, demand-response, shared ride transportation for individuals with disabilities that cannot use fixed-route public buses and subways.
payload.description: ADA legal mandate for paratransit service provision

tool_args.label: CTG developed backup AVLM software resiliency plan
tool_args.raw_text: CTG's Broker Car Service contract was modified to develop a backup (or "resiliency") plan to the then-existing AVLM software system. The plan served as a safety net in response to the ongoing complications with the then-existing contractor.

payload.claim_text: CTG's Broker Car Service contract was modified to develop a backup (or 'resiliency') plan to the then-existing AVLM software system.
payload.description: CTG modified contract to develop AVLM software including driver's application for routing directions and communicating with dispatch

tool_args.label: ION interim contracts exempt from M/WBE goals

payload.claim_text: Pursuant to the ION, these interim solution contracts were exempt from the requirement to establish M/WBE goals.
payload.description: Interim solution contracts exempt from M/WBE and SDVOB goals due to lack of qualified firms
